---
title: "UI_P011: 階層式導航原則"
subtitle: "UI應實施清晰的導航元素階層，頂層為主導航，每個主要區段內有一致的次級導航。這種階層式方法使應用程式結構直觀，並為使用者互動提供清晰的脈絡"
chapter: "CH04"
category: "principle"
number: "UI_P011"
date-created: "2025-04-09"
date-modified: "2025-08-17"
author: "Claude"
type: "principle"
law: "UI組件法"
article-number: 
  number: 11
  title: "階層式導航原則"
related_to:
  - "MP017: 模組化原則"
  - "MP067: UI分離元原則"
  - "R092: bs4Dash導航欄導航規則"
  - "R011: 混合側邊欄模式"
  - "UI_P009: 單行UI元素原則"
  - "UI_P010: 最小化CSS使用原則"
  - "R014: UI階層規則"
format:
  html:
    toc: true
    toc-depth: 3
    code-fold: false
    code-tools: true
    number-sections: true
---

# 第十一條：階層式導航原則 {#overview}

**UI組件法第十一條（階層式導航原則）**

UI應實施清晰的導航元素階層，頂層為主導航，每個主要區段內有一致的次級導航。這種階層式方法使應用程式結構直觀，並為使用者互動提供清晰的脈絡。

:::{.callout-important}
## 核心原則
透過明確定義和分離頂層與次級導航，創建直觀的使用者體驗，幫助使用者有效地在應用程式中導航。
:::

# 第一項：實施要求 {#implementation-requirements}

## 第一款：頂層導航 {#top-level-navigation}

**頂層導航標準：**

- 使用 bs4Dash navbarMenu 和 navbarTab 組件進行主導航（遵循 R92）
- 放置在介面頂部的一致位置
- 清楚區分活動與非活動狀態
- 聚焦於主要應用程式區段/模組

**實施範例：**

```r
# UI定義中的頂層導航
header = bs4Dash::dashboardHeader(
  navbarMenu(
    id = "main_navbar",
    navbarTab(
      text = HTML('<span class="navbarTab-content">
        <i class="fa fa-user mr-1"></i>
        <span>微觀分析</span>
      </span>'),
      tabName = "micro_tab"
    ),
    navbarTab(
      text = HTML('<span class="navbarTab-content">
        <i class="fa fa-chart-bar mr-1"></i>
        <span>宏觀分析</span>
      </span>'),
      tabName = "macro_tab"
    )
  )
)
```

## 第二款：第二層導航 {#second-level-navigation}

**第二層導航標準：**

- 使用動作按鈕在每個主要區段內容的頂部實施
- 為所有第二層導航元素應用一致的樣式
- 確保按鈕同時具有圖示和文字以提高可用性
- 放置在具有適當間距和對齊的容器中
- 使用活動/非活動視覺樣式來指示當前選擇

**實施範例：**

```r
# UI定義中的第二層導航
div(
  class = "second-level-nav-container",
  bs4Dash::box(
    width = 12,
    status = "primary",
    solidHeader = FALSE,
    uiOutput("micro_subtabs")
  )
)

# 伺服器函數中
micro_active_subtab <- reactiveVal("customer")

output$micro_subtabs <- renderUI({
  div(
    class = "d-flex justify-content-center my-2",
    actionButton(
      inputId = "micro_subtab_customer",
      label = translate("客戶檔案"),
      icon = icon("user"),
      class = paste0("btn ", 
        if(micro_active_subtab() == "customer") "btn-primary" else "btn-default"),
      style = "margin: 5px; min-width: 120px;"
    ),
    actionButton(
      inputId = "micro_subtab_dna",
      label = translate("DNA分布"),
      icon = icon("dna"),
      class = paste0("btn ", 
        if(micro_active_subtab() == "dna") "btn-primary" else "btn-default"),
      style = "margin: 5px; min-width: 120px;"
    )
  )
})
```

# 第二項：導航狀態管理 {#navigation-state-management}

## 第一款：狀態追蹤機制 {#state-tracking}

**狀態管理要求：**

- 獨立追蹤每個導航層級的活動狀態
- 使用響應式值管理活動狀態
- 實施適當的事件處理器來更新導航狀態
- 確保內容可見性正確地隨導航變更切換

**實施範例：**

```r
# 導航狀態管理器
createNavigationManager <- function() {
  # 初始化狀態
  states <- reactiveValues(
    primary = "micro_tab",
    micro_secondary = "customer",
    macro_secondary = "trends"
  )
  
  list(
    # 取得當前狀態
    getState = function(level = NULL) {
      if (is.null(level)) {
        return(reactiveValuesToList(states))
      }
      return(states[[level]])
    },
    
    # 設定狀態
    setState = function(level, value) {
      states[[level]] <- value
    },
    
    # 取得活動路徑
    getActivePath = function() {
      c(states$primary, 
        switch(states$primary,
          micro_tab = states$micro_secondary,
          macro_tab = states$macro_secondary
        ))
    },
    
    # 重置狀態
    reset = function() {
      states$primary <- "micro_tab"
      states$micro_secondary <- "customer"
      states$macro_secondary <- "trends"
    }
  )
}

# 使用導航管理器
nav_manager <- createNavigationManager()
```

## 第二款：事件處理 {#event-handling}

**導航事件處理：**

```r
# 處理微觀子標籤點擊
observeEvent(input$micro_subtab_customer, {
  # 更新導航狀態
  micro_active_subtab("customer")
  nav_manager$setState("micro_secondary", "customer")
  
  # 切換組件可見性
  if (!is.null(micro_components_union) && 
      !is.null(micro_components_union$component_state) && 
      is.function(micro_components_union$component_state$toggle_component)) {
    
    # 顯示客戶組件
    micro_components_union$component_state$toggle_component("customer", TRUE)
    # 隱藏其他組件
    micro_components_union$component_state$toggle_component("dna", FALSE)
    micro_components_union$component_state$toggle_component("analysis", FALSE)
  }
  
  # 記錄導航動作
  logNavigation("micro", "customer", session$user)
})

observeEvent(input$micro_subtab_dna, {
  micro_active_subtab("dna")
  nav_manager$setState("micro_secondary", "dna")
  
  if (!is.null(micro_components_union)) {
    micro_components_union$component_state$toggle_component("customer", FALSE)
    micro_components_union$component_state$toggle_component("dna", TRUE)
    micro_components_union$component_state$toggle_component("analysis", FALSE)
  }
  
  logNavigation("micro", "dna", session$user)
})
```

# 第三項：視覺一致性 {#visual-consistency}

## 第一款：樣式標準 {#styling-standards}

**視覺一致性要求：**

- 維持所有導航元素的一致高度和對齊
- 遵循 UI_P009：單行UI元素原則進行按鈕佈局
- 使用最小化CSS遵循 UI_P010：最小化CSS使用原則
- 在導航層級之間應用適當間距
- 確保主要和次要導航之間有清晰的視覺階層

**CSS實施：**

```css
/* 頂層導航樣式 */
.navbarTab-content {
  display: flex;
  align-items: center;
  height: 40px;
  line-height: 40px;
  white-space: nowrap;
}

.navbarTab-content i {
  margin-right: 5px;
  display: inline-flex;
}

/* 第二層導航容器 */
.second-level-nav-container {
  background: #f4f4f4;
  padding: 10px 0;
  border-bottom: 1px solid #dee2e6;
  margin-bottom: 20px;
}

/* 導航按鈕樣式 */
.second-level-nav-container .btn {
  height: 36px;
  line-height: 36px;
  padding: 0 15px;
  display: inline-flex;
  align-items: center;
  white-space: nowrap;
}

.second-level-nav-container .btn i {
  margin-right: 5px;
}

/* 活動狀態樣式 */
.btn-primary {
  background-color: #007bff;
  border-color: #007bff;
  color: white;
}

.btn-default {
  background-color: white;
  border-color: #dee2e6;
  color: #333;
}

.btn-default:hover {
  background-color: #e9ecef;
}
```

## 第二款：響應式設計 {#responsive-design}

**響應式導航實施：**

```r
# 響應式第二層導航
output$responsive_subtabs <- renderUI({
  screen_width <- input$screen_width %||% 1920
  
  if (screen_width < 768) {
    # 手機版：下拉選單
    selectInput(
      inputId = "micro_subtab_select",
      label = NULL,
      choices = list(
        "客戶檔案" = "customer",
        "DNA分布" = "dna",
        "行為分析" = "analysis"
      ),
      selected = micro_active_subtab()
    )
  } else {
    # 桌面版：按鈕組
    div(
      class = "d-flex justify-content-center my-2",
      lapply(list(
        list(id = "customer", label = "客戶檔案", icon = "user"),
        list(id = "dna", label = "DNA分布", icon = "dna"),
        list(id = "analysis", label = "行為分析", icon = "chart-line")
      ), function(btn) {
        actionButton(
          inputId = paste0("micro_subtab_", btn$id),
          label = translate(btn$label),
          icon = icon(btn$icon),
          class = paste0("btn ", 
            if(micro_active_subtab() == btn$id) "btn-primary" else "btn-default"),
          style = "margin: 5px; min-width: 120px;"
        )
      })
    )
  }
})

# 處理響應式選擇
observeEvent(input$micro_subtab_select, {
  micro_active_subtab(input$micro_subtab_select)
  updateNavigationDisplay(input$micro_subtab_select)
})
```

# 第四項：效益分析 {#benefits-analysis}

## 第一款：使用者體驗改善 {#ux-improvements}

**使用者體驗優勢：**

1. **直觀導航流程**：從一般到具體的導航流程
2. **清晰位置指示**：當前在應用程式中位置的視覺指標
3. **降低認知負荷**：透過一致模式減少使用者思考
4. **快速存取**：階層結構允許快速導航到特定功能
5. **上下文保持**：在導航時維持使用者的工作脈絡

## 第二款：維護與性能優勢 {#maintenance-performance}

**技術優勢：**

1. **維護效益**：
   - 實施導航的標準化方法
   - 更清晰的代碼組織分離導航層級
   - 更容易擴展額外的區段或子區段

2. **性能優勢**：
   - 透過切換可見性而非重建UI減少伺服器負載
   - 在次要選項之間切換時最小化UI重繪
   - 導航互動的響應性更好

# 第五項：完整實施範例 {#complete-implementation}

## 第一款：完整導航系統 {#complete-navigation-system}

**應用程式實施：**

```r
# navigation_system.R - 完整階層式導航系統
library(shiny)
library(bs4Dash)

# 導航配置
nav_config <- list(
  primary = list(
    micro = list(
      label = "微觀分析",
      icon = "user",
      subtabs = list(
        customer = list(label = "客戶檔案", icon = "user"),
        dna = list(label = "DNA分布", icon = "dna"),
        behavior = list(label = "行為分析", icon = "chart-line")
      )
    ),
    macro = list(
      label = "宏觀分析",
      icon = "chart-bar",
      subtabs = list(
        trends = list(label = "趨勢分析", icon = "trending-up"),
        segments = list(label = "市場區隔", icon = "pie-chart"),
        forecast = list(label = "預測模型", icon = "crystal-ball")
      )
    ),
    settings = list(
      label = "設定",
      icon = "cog",
      subtabs = list(
        profile = list(label = "個人檔案", icon = "id-card"),
        preferences = list(label = "偏好設定", icon = "sliders-h"),
        security = list(label = "安全設定", icon = "shield-alt")
      )
    )
  )
)

ui <- bs4DashPage(
  title = "階層式導航示範",
  
  # 頂層導航
  header = bs4DashNavbar(
    title = "應用程式",
    navbarMenu(
      id = "main_navbar",
      lapply(names(nav_config$primary), function(tab_id) {
        tab_info <- nav_config$primary[[tab_id]]
        navbarTab(
          text = HTML(sprintf(
            '<span class="navbarTab-content">
              <i class="fa fa-%s mr-1"></i>
              <span>%s</span>
            </span>',
            tab_info$icon, tab_info$label
          )),
          tabName = paste0(tab_id, "_tab")
        )
      })
    )
  ),
  
  sidebar = bs4DashSidebar(
    disable = TRUE  # 使用階層導航代替側邊欄
  ),
  
  body = bs4DashBody(
    # 導航樣式
    tags$style(HTML("
      .navbarTab-content {
        display: flex;
        align-items: center;
        height: 40px;
      }
      .second-level-nav-container {
        background: #f8f9fa;
        padding: 10px 0;
        border-bottom: 2px solid #dee2e6;
      }
      .nav-btn-active {
        background: #007bff !important;
        color: white !important;
      }
    ")),
    
    # 內容區域
    uiOutput("navigation_content")
  )
)

server <- function(input, output, session) {
  # 導航狀態管理
  nav_state <- reactiveValues(
    primary = "micro",
    secondary = list(
      micro = "customer",
      macro = "trends",
      settings = "profile"
    )
  )
  
  # 主導航觀察器
  observeEvent(input$main_navbar, {
    tab_name <- gsub("_tab$", "", input$main_navbar)
    nav_state$primary <- tab_name
  })
  
  # 渲染導航內容
  output$navigation_content <- renderUI({
    req(nav_state$primary)
    
    primary_tab <- nav_state$primary
    tab_config <- nav_config$primary[[primary_tab]]
    
    tagList(
      # 第二層導航
      div(
        class = "second-level-nav-container",
        div(
          class = "container-fluid",
          div(
            class = "d-flex justify-content-center",
            lapply(names(tab_config$subtabs), function(subtab_id) {
              subtab_info <- tab_config$subtabs[[subtab_id]]
              is_active <- nav_state$secondary[[primary_tab]] == subtab_id
              
              actionButton(
                inputId = paste0(primary_tab, "_", subtab_id, "_btn"),
                label = subtab_info$label,
                icon = icon(subtab_info$icon),
                class = paste("btn", if(is_active) "nav-btn-active" else "btn-outline-secondary"),
                style = "margin: 0 5px;"
              )
            })
          )
        )
      ),
      
      # 內容區域
      div(
        class = "container-fluid mt-3",
        uiOutput(paste0(primary_tab, "_content"))
      )
    )
  })
  
  # 動態創建第二層導航觀察器
  observe({
    req(nav_state$primary)
    
    primary_tab <- nav_state$primary
    tab_config <- nav_config$primary[[primary_tab]]
    
    lapply(names(tab_config$subtabs), function(subtab_id) {
      btn_id <- paste0(primary_tab, "_", subtab_id, "_btn")
      
      observeEvent(input[[btn_id]], {
        nav_state$secondary[[primary_tab]] <- subtab_id
        
        # 記錄導航動作
        message(sprintf("導航到：%s > %s", 
          tab_config$label, 
          tab_config$subtabs[[subtab_id]]$label))
      })
    })
  })
  
  # 微觀分析內容
  output$micro_content <- renderUI({
    req(nav_state$secondary$micro)
    
    content <- switch(nav_state$secondary$micro,
      customer = bs4Card(
        title = "客戶檔案",
        status = "primary",
        solidHeader = TRUE,
        width = 12,
        p("客戶檔案內容...")
      ),
      dna = bs4Card(
        title = "DNA分布",
        status = "info",
        solidHeader = TRUE,
        width = 12,
        p("DNA分布分析內容...")
      ),
      behavior = bs4Card(
        title = "行為分析",
        status = "success",
        solidHeader = TRUE,
        width = 12,
        p("行為分析內容...")
      )
    )
    
    return(content)
  })
  
  # 宏觀分析內容
  output$macro_content <- renderUI({
    req(nav_state$secondary$macro)
    
    content <- switch(nav_state$secondary$macro,
      trends = bs4Card(
        title = "趨勢分析",
        status = "warning",
        solidHeader = TRUE,
        width = 12,
        p("趨勢分析內容...")
      ),
      segments = bs4Card(
        title = "市場區隔",
        status = "danger",
        solidHeader = TRUE,
        width = 12,
        p("市場區隔內容...")
      ),
      forecast = bs4Card(
        title = "預測模型",
        status = "secondary",
        solidHeader = TRUE,
        width = 12,
        p("預測模型內容...")
      )
    )
    
    return(content)
  })
  
  # 設定內容
  output$settings_content <- renderUI({
    req(nav_state$secondary$settings)
    
    content <- switch(nav_state$secondary$settings,
      profile = bs4Card(
        title = "個人檔案",
        status = "primary",
        solidHeader = TRUE,
        width = 12,
        p("個人檔案設定...")
      ),
      preferences = bs4Card(
        title = "偏好設定",
        status = "info",
        solidHeader = TRUE,
        width = 12,
        p("應用程式偏好設定...")
      ),
      security = bs4Card(
        title = "安全設定",
        status = "danger",
        solidHeader = TRUE,
        width = 12,
        p("安全性設定...")
      )
    )
    
    return(content)
  })
}

shinyApp(ui, server)
```

# 第六項：原則關聯性 {#principle-relationships}

## 第一款：擴展關係 {#extending-relationships}

此原則：

1. **實施 MP017（模組化原則）**：透過模組化導航組件實現
2. **實施 MP067（UI分離）**：分離導航邏輯與內容呈現
3. **建立於 R092（bs4Dash導航欄導航）**：使用標準導航組件
4. **相關於 UI_P009（單行UI元素）**：保持導航元素的單行佈局
5. **遵循 UI_P010（最小化CSS使用）**：使用最少必要的CSS
6. **補充 R014（UI階層規則）**：提供具體的階層導航實施

---

*基於：UI組件法第十一條*  
*相關連結：[MP017 模組化原則](../../CH00_fundamental_principles/meta_principles/MP017_modularity.qmd), [UI_P009 單行UI元素原則](UI_P009_single_line_ui_elements.qmd)*
